prompt: A dramatic ultra-realistic sports celebration photo in a packed soccer stadium, centered on a leaping anthropomorphic puma mascot in midair on the field, both fists raised in triumph while holding a huge dark navy flag with a large gold puma emblem. The mascot has tan fur, a large expressive feline head with blue eyes and black whisker markings, and wears a white soccer kit with a gold chest emblem, white shorts, dark socks, and cleats. Surround the mascot with a roaring sea of fans dressed mostly in navy and gold, filling every visible stand. Add 4 visible pyrotechnic smoke columns blasting upward around the stadium and a storm of floating gold and blue confetti throughout the frame. Include 3 prominent crowd banners and signage areas: a giant black-and-gold banner reading “PUMAS,” repeated stadium ribbon signage reading “¡PUMAS 1º LUGAR!,” and field-level advertising with “LIGA BBVA” and “¡Gooooya!”. Bright daytime sunlight, vivid contrast, crisp motion frozen at the peak of the jump, low-angle wide sports photography composition, energetic championship atmosphere, cinematic realism, highly detailed textures, sharp focus on the mascot with the crowd and stadium remaining richly legible.
